category_sources: source_facts.description says it monitors sleep, wakeup, and idleness of a Mac; official homepage says SleepWatcher is a macOS command-line daemon for those events.
display_name_sources: Official homepage names “SleepWatcher 2.2.1”; source_facts.name is sleepwatcher.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best official documentation surface found; it describes purpose, versions, platform notes, and source availability.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage offers source code in release archives but no official source-control project URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage describe Mac sleep, wake, idleness monitoring and daemon/command-line behavior.
